name: IP Infringement
text: Each Party warrants that it shall not infringe the intellectual property rights of the other Party or any third party. Any such infringement shall constitute a material breach of this Agreement, entitling the non-breaching Party to all available legal and equitable remedies.
invalid_if: The intellectual property rights claimed are not validly owned or licensed by the claiming party.
The intellectual property is in the public domain or its statutory protection period has expired.
The alleged infringing act falls within statutory exceptions or fair use provisions under applicable IP laws.
The alleged infringing party has a valid license or authorization for the use of the intellectual property.
